creator: igor.arabesc.pavlov@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE-p7 GENERIC amd64

I have just upgraded to dnscrypt-proxy 1.4.0_3 from the previous version 1.4.0_2. The new version is unstable, it stops working after a few minutes or several hours.

/var/log/dnscrypt-proxy.log looks like this:

[NOTICE] Starting dnscrypt-proxy 1.4.0
[NOTICE] Proxying from 127.0.0.1:65053 to 176.56.237.171:443
[WARNING] sendto: [No buffer space available]

After the last record dnscrypt-proxy is no more visible in the process list.
1.4.0_2 was stable for me.
